infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to scan QR codes and barcodes for inventory and production tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used to record the location of prospect visits for the sales team.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow AKOKO SOLUTIONS ERP to access your camera to scan QR codes and barcodes.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow AKOKO SOLUTIONS ERP to record your location when logging prospect visits.
